task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pro Catalog' root category is created, active, and included in the menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin under Catalog > Categories, 'Pro Catalog' should exist at the root level (same level as Default Category). The settings should show 'Enable Category' set to Yes and 'Include in Menu' set to Yes.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Office Solutions' subcategory is created under 'Pro Catalog', active, and included in the menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Catalog > Categories, 'Office Solutions' should be nested directly under 'Pro Catalog'. The settings should show 'Enable Category' set to Yes and 'Include in Menu' set to Yes.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'NestWell Pro' Store Group is created, assigned to the Main Website, and linked to the 'Pro Catalog' root category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Stores > All Stores, a Store named 'NestWell Pro' should be visible under the Main Website column. Its Root Category should be explicitly set to 'Pro Catalog'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pro English' Store View is created under the 'NestWell Pro' store with code 'pro_en' and status Enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Stores > All Stores, a Store View named 'Pro English' should be visible under the 'NestWell Pro' store. The grid or settings page should show its code as 'pro_en' and its status as Enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the product 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) is assigned to the 'Office Solutions' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Catalog > Products, the product 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) should have 'Office Solutions' listed in its Categories column, OR in Catalog > Categories > 'Office Solutions', the product should be listed in the 'Products in Category' tab.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure categories and stores.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Magento Admin panel interface (Catalog and Stores menus) and filling out the respective web forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should show the Magento admin URL, and standard Magento UI elements (menus, buttons, grids, success messages) should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI for store or category creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows executing `bin/magento` commands or direct database SQL queries to create the categories or stores.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Root Category named 'Pro Catalog' and a subcategory 'Office Solutions'. A Store Group named 'NestWell Pro' must be linked to 'Pro Catalog'. A Store View named 'Pro English' (code 'pro_en') must be created under 'NestWell Pro'. Finally, the product 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) must be assigned to the 'Office Solutions' category.
